data.点击问题或回复数字查看答案: Click on the question or send the number to check the answer
data.我们会尽快联系你: We will contact you as soon as possible
data.对话已结束，您可以<1>开始新的对话</1>或<3>留言</3>: Conversation has ended, you may <1>continue</1> or <3>leave a message</3>?
data.你被移出了黑名单: You are removed from the blacklist
data.客服软件由{{企业名称}}提供: Customer service software provided by {{企业名称}}
data.欢迎使用完全免费的网页回呼与我们通话: Welcome, please use the fully free web to call us back
data.请保持电话畅通，客服人员即将致电: Please keep the phone available, the customer service is about to call
data.你将接到「010-52729285」的来电: You will receive a call from 「010-52729285」
data.排队失败，请刷新重试: Queuing failed. Please refresh and try again
data.抱歉没能理解您的提问，可选择: Sorry, we failed to understand your question, you can choose
data.评价失败，请稍后重试: Evaluation failed. Please try again later
data.粘贴图片失败，请用「图片按钮」上传图片: Failed to paste picture. Please use the 「picture button to upload the picture」
data.网络错误，请稍后重试: Network error. Please try again later
data.加载询前表单失败，请稍后重试: Failed to load the inquiry form, please try again later
data.连接已断开，请刷新页面: Disconnected. You will not be able to see the messages sent by the customer service, Please check the network
data.很抱歉您对此回答不满意: We are really sorry that you are dissatisfied with this answer
data.提交失败，请稍候再试: Failed to submit. Please try again later
data.请正确填写手机或带区号的座机号码: Please fill in the mobile phone number correctly or landline number with area code
data.请正确填写验证码: Please fill in the correct verification code
data.请正确填写姓名: Please fill in the name correctly
data.请正确填写手机号: Please fill in the mobile phone number correctly
data.请正确填写联系邮箱: Please fill in the correct email address
data.请正确填写微信: Please fill in the weChat correctly
data.请正确填写QQ: Please fill in the QQ correctly
data.请至少填写一项联系方式: Please fill in at least one contact information
data.请保持留言内容在 1～1000 字符内: Please keep the message in 1 to 1000 characters
data.留言失败，请稍候再试: Failed to leave a message. Please try again later
data.只能发送小于 50MB 的文件哦: You can only send documents less than 50MB
data.只能发送小于 5MB 的图片哦: You can only send photoes less than 5MB
data.最多只能发送 2048 个字符哦: You can only send up to 2048 characters
data.最多只能发送 30 个字符哦: You may only send up to 30 characters
data.最多只能发送 30 个字哦: You may only send up to 30 words
data.抱歉，客服系统暂时无法使用: Sorry, the customer service system is temporarily down
data.如果等不及，可以选择: If you can’t wait, you may choose
data.长时间未活动窗口已失效，请刷新页面: The long inactive window has expired, You will not be able to see the messages sent by the customer service, Please check the network
data.请至少填写一项: Please fill out at least one item
data.输入你的手机号码，点击「开始免费通话」按钮，系统将自动为你建立免费通话！: Enter your mobile number and click the "Start Free Call" button, the system will automatically establish a free call for you!
data.发起通话失败，请稍后再试: Call failed. Please try again later
data.表情提示: Tips: Don't panic, the emoji shows ◻︎ only in input area, just send it, everything will be fine.
data.* 支持 jpg 、png、gif、bmp 格式的图片，可上传 5 张，单张最大: * You can upload up to 5 pictures in jpg, png, gif and svg format with image size no more than 5M.
data.请填写正确的数字: Please fill in the correct number
data.请注意保护自身财产和隐私安全，涉及汇款、转账等务必谨慎。如需投诉举报，请: Please pay attention to protect your property and privacy, and be careful when it comes to remittance, transfer, etc. If you need a complaint, please
data.您的网络连接已断开，{{second}}秒后自动重连: Your network connection has been disconnected，Automatic reconnection in {{second}} seconds
data.当前对话不可用: The current session is not available
data.不支持发送该类型图片: The type of image is not supported
data.当前你的网络不佳，请检查网络后，刷新页面重试: Your network is currently poor. Please check your network and refresh the page to try again.
data.以便于您在应用中选择或上传相册内的内容: To facilitate selecting or uploading content from your album within the app
data.以便于您在应用中选择或上传文件: To facilitate selecting or uploading files within the app
data.留言流量达到上限: The message traffic limit has been reached
data.你可以输入评价备注: You can enter comments for your review
